text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Today marks the end of our time at summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Geez... Youth sure is fleeting, huh? I can't believe
camp is already over.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But this is no time to get sentimental. The Arima
Kinen will be here before we know it.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to use what I learned at camp to have
the best race possible!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
choice_data_list: I was thinking... of taking the bus...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
choice_data_list: I was thinking... of taking the bus...
I was thinking... of taking the bus...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Don't be ridiculous! You and I are going for a
joyride with Tata!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Don't be ridiculous! You and I are going for a
joyride with Tata!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Come on, let's burn rubber all the way home!
